findings.description: Data integrity verification — cryptographic proof of data consistency.
findings.recommendation: Use hash-chained audit logs for data integrity verification.

findings.description: Change management audit trail — all changes logged with attribution.
findings.recommendation: Log all data changes with user/node attribution.

findings.description: Access controls — segregation of duties and role-based access.
findings.recommendation: Implement RBAC with segregation of duties.

findings.description: Data retention — audit logs retained for required period.
findings.recommendation: Define and enforce audit log retention policies.

findings.description: No AuditLog provided. SOX IT General Control — Change Management requires audit log for all merge operations.
findings.recommendation: Pass an AuditLog instance to ComplianceAuditor(audit_log=...) or ComplianceAuditor.from_audit_log().

findings.description: No RBAC policy found for node 'default'. SOX IT General Control — Separation of Duties requires documented authorization.
findings.recommendation: Pass an RBACController instance to ComplianceAuditor(rbac=...) and define a policy for this node.
